ab: Muskun azak tama tantungu ha’an pantamaun naak takna.
ch: 昨天我和爸爸去拜訪我的叔叔。
en: Yesterday, my father and I visited my uncle.

ab: Milu’lu’ ca bantac it pantamaun naak.
Taqu’an cia azam tu mutuszuq ca tatavis lumaq.
ch: 他告訴我們，房子的屋頂破了一個洞。
en: He told us that there was a hole in the roof of his house.

ab: Minaca’an a cia tatavi muqalqal tu sikangna ka cias tatavi.
ch: 他在修理屋頂時，從屋頂摔下來了。
en: He fell off the roof while repairing it.

ab: Madas at tamas qasu’qanvang ciin saviki’ iscaiv it pantamaun naak.
ch: 爸爸帶了牛肉和檳榔給我的叔叔。
en: My father brought beef and betel nuts for my uncle.

ab: Muskun azak it pantamaun naak iha’an sabaqan pababazbaz, taqu ka cia madia’ sala ka qaiqabasan tu qalinga.
ch: 我和我的叔叔在房間裡聊天，他講了很多故事。
en: My uncle and I chatted in the room, and he shared many stories.

ab: Tantangaus is na mudaanak, matumacqaing zakun at pantamaun tu taldaingin, mintalminduu amin.
ch: 我要離開前，叔叔誇我長高了，也變得更帥氣了。
en: Before I left, my uncle praised me for growing taller and becoming more handsome.

ab: Tupa azak tu, “Tamanama’, mul’uang maca mincialin ca bantac, na munca’an amin lumaq naam kavivila’ ca ickuinin.”
ch: 我說：「等叔叔（Nama’）腳好了，下次也來我們家玩。」
en: I said, "When your foot gets better, come to our house next time and visit us."
